identity_baseline: Large, four-armed humanoid of the Martian warrior race.
physical_build: 15ft tall with a large, bipedal frame and four arms.
origin_or_historical_context: Martian setting; member of a warrior race.
movement_language: Approaches unarmed; capable of peaceful gestures.
stable_visual_summary: A massive, 15ft tall humanoid from the Martian warrior race characterized by olive-green skin and striking red eyes. The entity possesses four arms and a large bipedal frame. In peaceful contexts, the character approaches unarmed, utilizing a metal armlet as a symbolic peace offering.
costume_signature: Unarmed; carries a metal armlet as a peace offering.
personality: Capable of peaceful gestures despite warrior race origins.
continuity_constraints: Must maintain 15ft scale and four-arm anatomy.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific age or stage of life is not defined.
Detailed clothing or armor beyond the armlet is unknown.
